2605.25658.title: AutoSG: LLM-Driven Solver Generation Solely from Task Prompts for Expensive Optimization
2605.25658.paper_summary: Expensive optimization tasks are ubiquitous in real-world applications, demanding highly specialized solvers. While LLM-driven automated solver generation shows promise, current paradigms face three critical issues when tackling expensive optimization: factual hallucinations due to deficient domain knowledge, the frequent dismantling of previously established locally optimal structures during refinement, and the prohibitive evaluation costs alongside restricted generalization caused by executing on training instances. To address these issues, we introduce AutoSG, a fully automated workflow directly translating natural language prompts into executable customized solvers. AutoSG features three core innovations: a retrieval-augmented solver generation module strictly grounding code in verified literature; a one-step self-refinement operator introducing task-specific improvements while preserving critical structural components; and an instance-free Elo-based LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation mechanism rapidly establishing global rankings. Extensive evaluations across diverse expensive optimization tasks confirm AutoSG significantly outperforms human-designed state-of-the-art frameworks and existing LLM-generated solvers.
2605.25658.paper_summary_zh: 昂貴的優化任務在現實世界的應用中無處不在，需求高度專業化的求解器。雖然基於大型語言模型（LLM）的自動求解器生成顯示出潛力，但當面對昂貴的優化時，當前的範式面臨三個關鍵問題：由於領域知識不足而導致的事實幻覺、在精煉過程中經常拆解先前建立的局部最優結構，以及執行訓練實例所造成的高昂評估成本和有限的泛化能力。為了解決這些問題，我們引入了AutoSG，一個完全自動化的工作流程，將自然語言提示直接轉換為可執行的定制求解器。AutoSG具有三個核心創新：一個檢索增強的求解器生成模塊，嚴格地將代碼基於經驗證的文獻；一個單步自我精煉操作符，在保留關鍵結構組件的同時引入特定任務的改進；以及一個無實例的基於Elo的LLM作為評判的評估機制，快速建立全球排名。對各種昂貴優化任務的廣泛評估證實，AutoSG顯著超越了人類設計的最先進框架和現有的LLM生成求解器。
2605.25658.author: Haoran Gu et.al.
2605.25658.authors: Haoran Gu, Handing Wang, Yi Mei, Mengjie Zhang
